Understanding Anxiety in Students

Anxiety can affect concentration, attendance, mood, and sleep in adolescents.

Symptoms

Symptoms include excessive worry, panic, irritability, and trouble sleeping.

Parent Guidance

Parents can support teens by listening calmly and helping them build routines.

Activities

  • Practice belly breathing for five minutes.
  • Write down three coping thoughts.

FAQs

What should a parent say first? Start by validating feelings and asking open questions.

References

World Health Organization school mental health guidance.
